EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.account.name} failed to search the table "{object.name}" using the pattern "{object.value}" in the instance "{datafield2}"
The user {subject.account.name} viewed the table "{object.name}" containing database encryption information in the instance "{datafield2}"
The user {subject.account.name} failed to view the table "{object.name}" containing audit information about the instance "{datafield2}"
The user {subject.account.name} viewed the table "{object.name}" containing audit information about the instance "{datafield2}"
The user {subject.account.name} failed to view a list of their permissions in the instance "{datafield2}"
The user {subject.account.name} viewed the table "{object.name}" containing information about the locations of object backup copies of the instance "{datafield2}"
The user {subject.account.name} viewed a list of their permissions in the instance "{datafield2}"
The user {subject.account.name} failed to view the table "{object.name}" containing information about the locations of object backup copies of the instance "{datafield2}"
The user {subject.account.name} failed to view the table "{object.name}" containing database encryption information in the instance "{datafield2}"
The user {subject.account.name} failed to view the table "{object.name}" containing credential information in the instance "{datafield2}"
The user {subject.account.name} viewed the table "{object.name}" containing credential information in the instance "{datafield2}"
The user {subject.account.name} searched the table "{object.name}" using the pattern "{object.value}" in the instance "{datafield2}"
